nodes.label: Three-Tier Screen Time Tracking Model
nodes.rationale: Tier A: exact per-app usage rendered on-device by a DeviceActivityReport extension and never leaves the device (Apple isolates that extension from network and shared storage). Tier B: approximate usage captured by a DeviceActivityMonitor extension via threshold events, handed to the app through the App Group (group.com.rizeclone.shared), synced flagged precision: approximate. Tier C: manual timers and focus sessions are exact and sync fully.

nodes.label: FamilyControls Entitlement Approval Dependency (RIZ-20)
nodes.rationale: com.apple.developer.family-controls works in development with the capability enabled, but App Store distribution requires Apple approval via their request form (typically weeks). project.yml deliberately does not request the entitlement yet, so it cannot currently block signing; the release workflow carries a marker comment to gate on it once added.

edges.source_location: Configuration: same // escaping rule stated verbatim
